response.justification: Bogdan has valuable geospatial domain expertise and proven ability to build systems at scale, but has a significant gap in modern C++—the primary requirement. His last C++ work was in 2014-2015; the past decade has focused on TypeScript, JavaScript, and product development rather than systems programming. While his learning capability is strong, this represents substantial risk for a mid-senior IC role requiring current C++ proficiency.
strengths: Strong geospatial/GIS background with proven ability to build mapping and data collection platforms used in production
Demonstrated expertise building and operating high-scale distributed systems (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Clear track record of technical leadership, experimentation-driven problem-solving, and willingness to expand across the full stack
concerns: C++ experience is 10+ years stale (last hands-on work 2014-2015); recent career trajectory heavily weighted toward TypeScript and product work
No demonstrated experience with routing algorithms, navigation guidance systems, or traffic data optimization
Recent roles at Stripe and Shopify trend toward higher-level product and AI infrastructure rather than systems-level performance engineering
